{{Infobox technique
| name = Imperial Execution Style
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Imperial Execution Style]] is a [[Combat Art]] of which the speaker is a ninth-generation master.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c4">''The Engineer'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Felrex]] uses an orichalcum [[sword]] to magnify his [[Imperial Execution Style]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c36">''The Knight'', chapter 36</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Imperial Execution Style]] is a combat technique used by Shyrax.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c25">''The Pilot'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Imperial Execution Style]] can be used as a follow-up strike.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c45">''The Pilot'', chapter 45</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
